_note: Feature with 4 ACs: download trigger, PDF header, empty state, permission gate. Edge cases: slow generation, empty range. Expected step-7 output: 5+ scenarios, Merchant actor, domain language only, business-outcome Then steps.

feature.title: Feature: Settlement PDF export
feature.body:
## Goal
Merchants can export their settlement history as a PDF for accounting and audit purposes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Merchants can click "Export PDF" to download a formatted PDF of their settlement history
- [ ] The PDF includes a header with the Merchant name, export date, and date range
- [ ] An empty result set produces a PDF with headers and a 'No settlements found' message
- [ ] Only Merchants with the `settlement.export` permission can trigger an export

## Edge Cases
- PDF generation takes longer than 10 seconds → show a progress indicator; do not time out silently
- Merchant has no settlements in range → PDF shows 'No settlements found' with headers intact

## Domain Events
- `SettlementExportRequested` — emitted when a Merchant triggers a PDF export
- `SettlementExportReady` — emitted when the PDF is available for download

## Bounded Context
Settlement domain. Merchant actor. Reads from settlement records; no write side effects.
